title: Appletons' Popular Science Monthly, March 1899: Volume LIV, No. 5, March 1899

This issue of the magazine features a compilation of articles on diverse scientific topics, including social evolution, colonial life, and natural history, reflecting the interests and concerns of the time regarding advancements in knowledge and societal changes.
